languages.text: "Знаю. Мне доложили". {n}В голосе полковника звенит напряжение. Капитан нервно переминается с ноги на ногу.{/n}
"I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Знаю. Мне доложили". {n}В голосе полковника звенит напряжение. Капитан нервно переминается с ноги на ногу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice rings with tension. The captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}
"I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice rings with tension. The captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}
"I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}
"I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}

languages.text: “我知道。报告我已经收到了。”{n}上校的嗓音因紧张而发紧，上尉则局促不安地在原地反复挪动脚步。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我知道。报告我已经收到了。”{n}上校的嗓音因紧张而发紧，上尉则局促不安地在原地反复挪动脚步。{/n}

languages.text: "Biliyorum. Rapor ettiler." {n}Albay'ın sesi gerginlikle kısılırken Yüzbaşı, gergince bir ayağından diğerine ağırlığını veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Biliyorum. Rapor ettiler." {n}Albay'ın sesi gerginlikle kısılırken Yüzbaşı, gergince bir ayağından diğerine ağırlığını veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Je sais. J'ai reçu le rapport. » {n}La voix du colonel est empreinte de tension, tandis que la capitaine se balance nerveusement d'un pied sur l'autre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je sais. J'ai reçu le rapport. » {n}La voix du colonel est empreinte de tension, tandis que la capitaine se balance nerveusement d'un pied sur l'autre.{/n}

languages.text: «Lo sé. He recibido el informe». {n}La voz del coronel está cargada de tensión, mientras la capitana pasa el peso de un pie a otro, nerviosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Lo sé. He recibido el informe». {n}La voz del coronel está cargada de tensión, mientras la capitana pasa el peso de un pie a otro, nerviosa.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich weiß. Ich habe den Bericht erhalten." {n}Die Stimme des Colonels ist angespannt, während die Captain-Quartiermeisterin von einem Fuß auf den anderen tritt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß. Ich habe den Bericht erhalten." {n}Die Stimme des Colonels ist angespannt, während die Captain-Quartiermeisterin von einem Fuß auf den anderen tritt.{/n}

languages.text: 「承知しました。報告書は受け取りました。」{n}大佐の緊張した声。一方、艦長は足踏みをしながら不安そうにしている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know. I've received the report." {n}The colonel's voice is tight with tension, while the captain shifts nervously from foot to foot.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「承知しました。報告書は受け取りました。」{n}大佐の緊張した声。一方、艦長は足踏みをしながら不安そうにしている。{/n}
